expectations.evidence: Uses columns={{ mobile: "1", tablet: "2", desktop: "3" }} on Grid instead of gridColumnSpan on children

expectations.text: Mobile breakpoint included in responsive gridColumnSpan or columns prop
expectations.evidence: columns={{ mobile: "1", tablet: "2", desktop: "3" }} includes mobile

expectations.text: Gap uses token string values (e.g. "300") not numeric values (e.g. 3)
expectations.evidence: gap="300" is a valid string token

expectations.text: Gap/spacing set on parent container, not margin on individual cards
expectations.evidence: gap on Grid parent, no margin on cards
